v0.8.5.description:
- Changed the item classification of Locust Idols to deprioritized so now they wont be placed in priority locations. 
- Fixed a bug that made playing in asyncs inadvisable due to a specific item not being received properly when not connected in game.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/compare/v0.8.4.9...v0.8.5
v0.8.5.title: v0.8.5: Locust deprioritization and async bug fix

v0.9.1.0.description:
Waypoints Update (0.9.1.0):

Added Waypoints and Debug screen to AP Menu
Connection Menu improvements
Tracker now shows Greed Coins
Major logic improvements from 0.9.0.0:
Complete logic rewrite and addition of most methods of skipping rooms are now accounted for


For further details, see [Changelog.txt](https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/blob/main/Changelog.txt)
v0.9.1.0.title: v0.9.1.0

v0.9.2.0.description:
## What's Changed
General:
	Locusts are now obtained from chests just like vanilla
	Numbered Brane locust chests are now always AP Checks
	Max Locust Up's are included in the item pool and increase your maximum capacity for holding locusts
	Mon Bank now deals with Bonus Locusts, which are filler items not factored into logic
	
Generation:
	Locustsanity is now forced on
	Generation shouldn't fail, probably
	
Yaml:
	Removed Locustsanity option
	New setting "Max Locust Up Size"
	Greed Coin Amount range is now from 1-30

Bugfixes:
	Receiving multiple items in quick succession will no longer delete locusts, progressive brands, or greed coins
	Burdens are now properly received from AP

Misc:
	AP Items are now saved to file and should not reset upon game close or reconnecting to AP
	To properly reset between multiworlds, select End Run from the pause menu
	Fixed typo on room name of Floor 196
v0.9.2.0.title: v0.9.2.0

v0.9.2.1.description:
## What's Changed
Fixed a logic error in the rule for reaching the "Mural of Pride" location.
